title: Repair archive growth budget
outOfScope: Do not change product behavior, release metadata, or published tags/assets.
Do not combine this budget repair with the One Release Truth implementation.

sources.reason: Archive growth budget exceeded by the newly created Work Item archive.
Regression tests that fail when archiveGrowth exceeds the configured maximum.

riskAssessment.reason: Documentation-only governance budget adjustment with no runtime or release behavior change.

executionDecision.reason: User previously authorized independent budget repairs for measured governance evidence growth.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: archiveGrowth maximum is raised from 450 to 460 with a repayment record for the measured archive count of 451.
The complexity check passes and no release or runtime behavior changes are included.
The Work Item has a Contract v2/Summary, passes its declared checks, and is independently archived before its PR is merged and closed.
guidelines: Keep budget changes bounded, attributable, and paired with a repayment record.
Do not use a budget repair to mask unrelated verification failures.

intent.problem: The additional Work Item 1 archive raises immutable archiveGrowth from 450 to 451, causing the governance complexity gate and CI matrix to fail closed.
constraints: Change only the bounded archive budget and its repayment evidence.
Preserve the measured archive count and do not loosen unrelated limits.
Keep release behavior and Work Item 1 implementation out of scope.
intent.rationale: A separately reviewed budget repair keeps the one-Work-Item/one-PR boundary intact while making the measured lifecycle evidence growth explicit.

rawUserRequest: 已授权创建独立预算修复 Work Item/PR；修复后继续工单流程。

declaredIntent.summary: Repair only the measured archive growth budget required by the new Work Item archive.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Measured archive growth is within the explicitly raised ceiling and repayment is recorded.
No unrelated release or runtime behavior changes are included.
Governance complexity validation passes after the repair.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the independent budget repair Work Item/PR.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
